message:
fix(clippy): address nightly clippy lints in three pre-existing call sites

cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings (the CI invocation) was
failing on three lints stabilized in the recent nightly toolchain:

- package_manager.rs:1827 — clippy::unneeded_wildcard_pattern: drop the
  redundant 'r#ref: _,' line; the trailing '..' already covers it.
- extension_preflight.rs:874 — clippy::question_mark: collapse the
  if-else-let-else fallthrough into a single match arm using '?'.
- extensions.rs:27354 — clippy::question_mark: collapse the nested
  'if let Some / else { return None; }' into a let-else-?'d expression.

All three are syntax-only refactors with identical semantics; fixes
unblock CI clippy gate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
